arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal still interested in signing 'outstanding' striker who they've absolutely loved since 2022
arts.sum: Harry Kane called Arsenal's striker target an "outstanding talent." 👀

arts.ttl: Arsenal pursuing move for Chelsea target Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Arsenal are keen to rival Premier League rivals Chelsea to the signing of French Bayern Munich centre-forward Mathys Tel (19), according to The Independent. The outlet understands that the Gunners…

arts.ttl: Inside Mikel Arteta to Rangers transfer as Arsenal boss reveals he had a different plan entirely
arts.sum: The deal to bring the Barcelona academy graduate to Ibrox almost didn't happen

arts.ttl: ‘I’m hearing’: Arsenal are ‘close’ to making £12m signing now – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are yet to make a signing in the January transfer window. Indeed, the Gunners haven’t been active at all this month, despite being linked...

arts.ttl: Arsenal step up pursuit of Chelsea target Mathys Tel but face one stumbling block
arts.sum: The French teenager is keen to secure regular football, which could suit the Gunners and help them to beat rivals Chelsea in the race

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Girona, Myles Lewis-Skelly, Michael Oliver and transfers
arts.sum: Obviously very happy that the decision has been made and that Myles is going to be able to play for us again in the next few games. Well, it does affect, yes, because obviously, we've had a lot of uncertainty, not only for Sunday, but for tomorrow and for the next few games as well, so now we have more options, he's going to be available and it's something very positive for the team.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly red card appeal decision could speed up next Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: Into the final six months of his contract at the Emirates Stadium, football.london understands the 27-year-old has been in discussions with Celtic over a return for some time. "Ideally, that would [happen in January] but, at this moment, he's still an Arsenal player," Celtic's manager, Brendan Rodgers, said during his pre-match press conference before a Champions League game with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: What Arsenal did to desperately keep hold of Ayden Heaven amid Man United transfer
arts.sum: According to our colleagues at the Manchester Evening News, Heaven would join the club as a first-team signing and thus could feature in the Premier League for his new team. Arsenal reportedly made a desperate bid to try and keep Ayden Heaven ahead of his expected move to Manchester United in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'Every time': What Harry Kane has said about Mathys Tel as Tottenham and Arsenal offered the striker
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel could suddenly become an option for north London rivals Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur in the final days of the January...

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal make Tel U-turn as Arteta targets January wonderkid move
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to make Bayern Munich an offer for striker Mathys Tel before the close of the January transfer window, FootballTransfers has been told by sources. The Emirates side had made Benjamin Sesko of RB Leipzig their ideal January signing, but the Bundesliga club are refusing to sell at this point while other targets such as Nico Williams and Viktor Gyokeres will not be up for sale until the summer either.
